inputs.corpus: Stream C corpus from 24 indexed sessions on this same project. In 16 sessions the agent burned 3+ turns rediscovering that long-running commands must be launched with the background runner instead of a blocking foreground call; sessions that used the background runner from the start finished the same task in markedly fewer turns.
inputs.existing_rules_summary: 4 active rules, none about background vs foreground command execution.

rule_under_test.name: run-long-tasks-in-background
rule_under_test.content: Launch long-running or watch-style commands with the background runner rather than a blocking foreground call so the session is not stalled waiting on them.

expected_judgment.rationale: Strong recurring cross-session signal on the same project with a clear efficiency delta between sessions that did and did not follow the behavior. Well-grounded Stream-C positive.
